design_philosophy.core_concept: Minority Report meets Modern ATS. High-tech, scanning lines, data visibility, neon glows.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark Mode Only. Cyberpunk influences but clean enough for HR professionals.

usage_rules.headings: Use Space Grotesk for all H1-H6. Tracking tight (-0.02em). Uppercase for H6 labels.
usage_rules.body: Use Outfit for all paragraphs. High legibility.
usage_rules.code: Use JetBrains Mono for extracted data, resume scores, and OCR raw text.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Landing, Mode B for Dashboard)
layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Generous. Use gap-6 or gap-8 to let data breathe.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border border-primary/50 bg-transparent hover:bg-primary/10 text-primary-foreground transition-all

cards.style: Glassmorphism. bg-void/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.interaction: Hover: distinct glow or border color shift

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg h-12

scanner_overlay.description: A viewfinder overlay for the camera component
scanner_overlay.animation: A scanning line moving up and down continuously

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use purple-to-cyan gradients sparingly for emphasis (e.g., score gauges).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Active elements get purple borders.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the background to reduce banding and add 'tactile' feel.

motion_guidelines.loading_states: Glitch text effect or scanning beam animation. NOT a simple spinner.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure purple text on black background is at least 4.5:1. Use lighter purples (Violet-300/400) for text, darker for bg.
accessibility.interactive_elements: Min height 44px for touch targets (mobile first).
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable scanning beam animation if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'void', 'cyber-purple', 'neon-cyan' colors.
3. CAMERA: When building the CameraScanner, ensure the video element has object-fit: cover and takes up the full container. Overlay controls on top with absolute positioning.
4. OCR LOADING: Implement a 'Deciphering' UI state where the text appears to be scanned line by line.
5. DASHBOARD: Use the Bento Grid layout for the analysis results. Score in a big square, skills in a tall rectangle.
6. USE SHADCN: Heavily customize Shadcn components (Card, Button, Dialog) to match the glassmorphism style. Remove default white backgrounds.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to the upload button, camera toggle, and analysis result containers.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
